ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "banner_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's banner picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the post */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL associated with the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the post based on user votes */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the post is pinned or not */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Whether the post is locked or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES post_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the vote was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the notification is related to */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the notification is related to */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote the notification is related to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new comment, new vote) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the report was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the report was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the action was taken on */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the action was taken on */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., delete, edit, ban) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the metric is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the metric is related to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., views, votes, comments) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
